title: Convert OAuth flow from client_secret to PKCE for desktop/packaged app security
goal: OAuth 플로우를 PKCE(Proof Key for Code Exchange) 방식으로 전환한다. client_secret 의존을 제거하고, code_verifier/code_challenge 쌍으로 인증한다. 패키지 배포 시 시크릿 유출 위험이 없어진다.

test_requirements.expected: verifier is 43-128 chars, challenge is base64url-encoded SHA256 of verifier

test_requirements.case: authorize endpoint returns auth_url with code_challenge and code_challenge_method=S256
test_requirements.expected: auth_url contains code_challenge param and code_challenge_method=S256

test_requirements.case: authorize endpoint does NOT include client_secret in auth_url
callback sends code_verifier instead of client_secret to token endpoint
test_requirements.expected: token exchange POST body has code_verifier, no client_secret

test_requirements.case: token refresh still works without client_secret
test_requirements.expected: refresh request uses client_id only, no client_secret required

test_requirements.case: code_verifier stored temporarily with state token and cleaned up after use
test_requirements.expected: after callback, verifier is removed from memory

test_requirements.case: Old client_secret config is ignored if present
test_requirements.expected: system works even if google_oauth_client_secret is set in config

constraints: PKCE spec: code_verifier = random 43-128 char string (A-Z a-z 0-9 -._~)
PKCE spec: code_challenge = base64url(sha256(code_verifier)) with no padding
Use only stdlib (hashlib, base64, secrets) — no external PKCE library
Do not remove client_secret reading from config — just make it optional/ignored for PKCE flow
Do not break existing tests — existing oauth_flow tests must still pass
The authorize endpoint must store code_verifier alongside state token in the same TTL cache
Do not modify frontend files or driver files
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
